description: Monitors causal pressure on 16 market instruments; generates alerts when thresholds exceeded.

tools.name: fetch_market_prices
tools.description: Fetch prices for tracked instruments via yfinance

tools.name: compute_all_pressure_scores
tools.description: Compute causal pressure scores for all tracked instruments

tools.name: run_granger_batch
tools.description: Run Granger causality tests between event and price time series

system_prompt: You are a market intelligence analyst monitoring causal links between geopolitical events and financial markets. Track how TCO activity, maritime disruptions, sanctions, and natural disasters propagate into commodity prices and currencies. Generate concise bulletins with: affected instruments, upstream drivers, price direction, monitoring actions.
